prompt: Filename target: hero.png. Beautiful polished 2D pixel-art 16:9 concept scene for The Builder Trail. First-person threshold view with no character visible and no hands. Show two valid lifestyles, not good versus bad: left side is a clean modern office morning with soft daylight, badge, notebook, glass meeting room, city view; right side is a calm home builder studio with coffee, sketches, family photo, plants, sunrise, and one tasteful laptop as a tool rather than the whole subject. Balanced lighting, both sides attractive but different. No dominant monitor wall, no doom mood, no foreground avatar. Premium indie pixel art, cinematic, no readable text, no logos.

Filename target: office.png. Beautiful polished 2D pixel-art 16:9 corporate office scene from the player's seat at a conference table. Keep it simple like a strong game background: three coworkers max, coffee cups, notebooks, badge lanyard, glass room depth, calm office lighting with a little tension. A small background screen may exist but must not dominate. Premium indie pixel art, readable silhouettes, no readable text, no logos.

Filename target: okr-maze.png. Beautiful polished 2D pixel-art 16:9 OKR dependency scene. One large whiteboard dominates with a clean maze-like set of abstract boxes and arrows; only two or three PM silhouettes debating beside it. Keep the composition uncluttered and graphic, not a crowded meeting. No laptop as main subject. Premium indie pixel art, satirical but readable, no readable text, no logos.

Filename target: strategy-summit.png. Beautiful polished 2D pixel-art 16:9 all-day strategy summit scene. Simple long conference table with a few sandwich boxes, coffee cups, three tired coworkers, one sticky-note wall in the background, warm late afternoon light, and one or two closed laptops on the table. Avoid clutter and crowds; make the emptiness of a long day the joke. Laptops are props, not the focal point. Premium indie pixel art, no readable text, no logos.

Filename target: doc-comments.png. Beautiful polished 2D pixel-art 16:9 close-up of one printed strategy document on a table. A few oversized sticky notes, red pen marks, binder clip, coffee ring, and a single stack of pages. Keep it clean, tactile, and iconic rather than messy. No computer. No readable text, no logos, no avatar. Premium indie pixel art, paper texture, strong lighting.

Filename target: vp-review.png. Beautiful polished 2D pixel-art 16:9 waiting-on-VP scene. Quiet hallway outside an executive conference room: closed glass door, one empty chair, one office plant, a neat slide packet in the foreground, soft cool light. Minimal objects, strong negative space, stalled decision mood. No dominant screen. Premium indie pixel art, no readable text or logos.

Filename target: reorg.png. Beautiful polished 2D pixel-art 16:9 reorg scene. One half-packed desk, one moving box, a simple wall org chart of abstract boxes, two distant coworker silhouettes. Filename target: demo.png. Beautiful polished 2D pixel-art 16:9 AI demo day scene. Focus on one podium, one projector beam, a few audience silhouettes, remote clicker on table, dramatic cyan light.
